Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Interface IBridgeServiceRegistration<T>

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Core.dll

Implemented by source-generated registration classes for JsExportAttribute interfaces. Provides reflection-free handler registration, JS stub generation, and method metadata.

public interface IBridgeServiceRegistration<in T> where T : class

Type Parameters

T

The JsExportAttribute-marked interface type.

Properties

MethodNames

Full RPC method names (e.g. ["AppService.getCurrentUser", "AppService.saveSettings"]).

IReadOnlyList<string> MethodNames { get; }

Property Value

IReadOnlyList<string>

ServiceName

The RPC service name (e.g. "AppService").

string ServiceName { get; }

Property Value

string

Methods

DisconnectEvents(T)

Disconnects all event channels. Called by Remove.

void DisconnectEvents(T implementation)

Parameters

implementation T

GetJsStub()

Returns the JavaScript client stub code for this service.

string GetJsStub()

Returns

string

RegisterHandlers(IWebViewRpcService, T)

Registers RPC handlers for all methods, calling the implementation directly (no reflection).

void RegisterHandlers(IWebViewRpcService rpc, T implementation)

Parameters

rpc IWebViewRpcService
implementation T

UnregisterHandlers(IWebViewRpcService)

Removes all RPC handlers registered by RegisterHandlers(IWebViewRpcService, T).

void UnregisterHandlers(IWebViewRpcService rpc)

Parameters

rpc IWebViewRpcService
